name: Chocolate Instant Breakfast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Banana, or ripe peeled pear
recipeInstructions:
1. CHOCOLATE SAUCE: Combine cornstarch and cocoa in a saucepan. Whisk into cold water until there are no dry bits. Cook, stirring frequently, until the mixture comes to a boil. Stir for 1 minute until thickened. Remove from heat, stir in sweetener (aspartame is acceptable) and vanilla, then allow to cool. Store in a clean jar in the refrigerator up to 6 weeks. Makes 12 servings, about 2 1/4 cups. Each serving contains 3 tablespoons: 12 calories, 2 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram protein, 1+ extra choice (free exchange).
2. MOCHA SAUCE: Substitute 2 cups strong coffee for water.
3. INSTANT BREAKFAST: Combine milk, egg, banana, sauce, and vanilla in a blender. Blend at high speed until frothy. Makes about 1 1/2 cups. One serving contains 202 calories, 23 grams carbohydrate, 14 grams protein, 6 grams fat (1 protein choice, 2 milk choices (2%), 1 fruit & vegetable choice). Half serving (3/4 cup) contains 2 milk choices (2%), 103 calories.
